result.finding: Docker Compose is the only orchestration tool used. A single docker-compose.yml file at the project root defines two services (application + Oracle DB). No Kubernetes manifests, Docker Swarm configs, or Helm charts detected.
evidence: docker-compose.yml present at project root with 2 services: oracle-db and photoalbum-java-app
No k8s/, manifests/, or helm/ directories found
No Kubernetes apiVersion/kind patterns found in YAML files
No kubectl, helm, or docker stack commands in CI/CD workflows
values: No Kubernetes, no Docker Swarm, no Helm
